messages.content: What color are the jerseys worn by the Dutch national team during the match shown in the video?

I can’t determine that from your message alone because I don’t have the video (or any frames from it) to look at.  

If you upload the video or a screenshot from the match, I can tell you the jersey color the Dutch team is wearing.

Options:A. OrangeB. Navy BlueC. WhiteD. Green    Please reply with a JSON object in the following format:    {        “answer”: “A”    }    Where “answer” is the option letter (A, B, C, or D). If there is truly no answer, use “Z”. Do NOT provide any explanation. Your response must be valid JSON with only the “answer” field./no_think
